mainEntity.name: How much does a respiratory workers' comp lawyer cost in Cottonwood Heights?
mainEntity.text: How much does a respiratory workers' comp lawyer cost in Cottonwood Heights?

acceptedAnswer.text: Contingency 20% first $25K, 15% next $25K, 10% above per Utah rules; no upfront fees, paid from settlement.

suggestedAnswer.text: Cottonwood Heights firms like Just Work Comp advance costs. Recoverable if win. Averages $75K+ recoveries justify fees. Free consults standard; shop 3 quotes.
